# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: my-destination-rule
spec:
  host: "*"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL

---
apiVersion: authorization.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: my-server-authorization
spec:
  serverSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: "server-app"
  policy:
    portBased:
      - portName: http
        services:
          - matchLabels:
              app: "client-app"
            authorizationPolicy: PERMIT

---
apiVersion: authorization.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: my-server-authorization-service-account
spec:
  serverSelector:
    labels:
      app: "server-app"
  policy:
    serviceAccountBased:
      - namespace: default
        serviceAccount: client-service-account
        authorizationPolicy: DENY
